description: This file defines an API interface for managing notes, including functions for listing, creating, updating, pinning, starring, and deleting notes via HTTP requests.

methods.name: url(path)
methods.description: Constructs a full API URL from a given path, supporting optional base URL.

methods.name: request(path, options = {})
methods.description: Performs a fetch request to the API, handles JSON parsing and error handling.

methods.name: listNotes({ q, tag, tags, starred, limit = 50, offset = 0 })
methods.description: Retrieves a list of notes with optional search, tagging, and filtering parameters.

methods.name: createNote({ title, content, tags })
methods.description: Creates a new note with specified title, content, and tags.

methods.name: updateNote(id, { title, content, tags, pinned, starred })
methods.description: Performs a patch update to an existing note's properties.

methods.name: setNotePinned(id, pinned)
methods.description: Pins or unpins a note by updating its 'pinned' status.

methods.name: setNoteStarred(id, starred)
methods.description: Stars or unstars a note by updating its 'starred' status.

methods.name: deleteNote(id)
methods.description: Deletes a note by its ID.

ctags.name: createNote
ctags.pattern: /^export async function createNote({ title, content, tags }) {$/

ctags.name: listNotes
ctags.pattern: /^export async function listNotes({ q, tag, tags, starred, limit = 50, offset = 0 }) {$/
ctags.signature: ({ q, tag, tags, starred, limit = 50, offset = 0 })

ctags.name: updateNote
ctags.pattern: /^export async function updateNote(id, { title, content, tags, pinned, starred }) {$/
